parameters.query:
WITH aggregated AS (
  SELECT
    speaker_id,
    key_label,
    MAX(model_conf)         AS max_model_conf,
    COUNT(*)                AS total_repeat_count,
    MIN(first_seen)         AS first_seen_ts,
    MAX(last_seen)          AS last_seen_ts,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(last_seen) - MIN(first_seen))) / 86400 AS span_days,
    MAX(CASE WHEN asserted_by = 'self' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_self_assertion,
    STRING_AGG(value_text, ' ||| ' ORDER BY last_seen DESC) AS all_values,
    STRING_AGG(id::text, ',' ORDER BY last_seen DESC) AS row_ids
  FROM userinfo
  GROUP BY speaker_id, key_label
),
scored AS (
  SELECT *,
    LEAST(1.0,
      0.70 * COALESCE(max_model_conf, 0.5)
      + 0.20 * LEAST(1.0, LN(1 + total_repeat_count) / LN(4))
      + CASE WHEN has_self_assertion = 1 THEN 0.20 ELSE 0.05 END
      + CASE WHEN total_repeat_count > 2 THEN 0.10 ELSE 0.0 END
    ) AS computed_confidence
  FROM aggregated
)
SELECT scored.* FROM scored
LEFT JOIN core_claim cc
  ON cc.speaker_id = scored.speaker_id
  AND cc.key_label = scored.key_label
  WHERE cc.core_id IS NULL
  AND (
    (scored.has_self_assertion = 1 AND scored.computed_confidence >= 0.75)
    OR
    (scored.has_self_assertion = 0 AND scored.total_repeat_count >= 2 AND scored.computed_confidence >= 0.85 AND scored.span_days >= 7)
  );

INSERT INTO core_claim (speaker_id, key_label, claim_text, status, confidence, visibility, last_seen)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, 'approved', $4, 'all', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (speaker_id, key_label) DO UPDATE SET
  claim_text = CASE
    WHEN core_claim.locked THEN core_claim.claim_text
    ELSE EXCLUDED.claim_text
  END,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  status = CASE
    WHEN core_claim.locked THEN core_claim.status
    ELSE 'approved'
  END,
  visibility = CASE
    WHEN core_claim.locked THEN core_claim.visibility
    ELSE 'all'
  END,
  last_seen = NOW();

INSERT INTO audit_log (who, action, details)
VALUES ('guardian', 'promote', $1::jsonb);

UPDATE core_claim
SET status = 'proposed'
WHERE status = 'provisional'
  AND ttl_ts IS NOT NULL
  AND ttl_ts < NOW();

WITH aggregated AS (
  SELECT
    speaker_id,
    key_label,
    MAX(model_conf)         AS max_model_conf,
    COUNT(*)                AS total_repeat_count,
    MIN(first_seen)         AS first_seen_ts,
    MAX(last_seen)          AS last_seen_ts,
    EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(last_seen) - MIN(first_seen))) / 86400 AS span_days,
    MAX(CASE WHEN asserted_by = 'self' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_self_assertion,
    STRING_AGG(value_text, ' ||| ' ORDER BY last_seen DESC) AS all_values,
    STRING_AGG(id::text, ',' ORDER BY last_seen DESC) AS row_ids
  FROM userinfo
  GROUP BY speaker_id, key_label
),
scored AS (
  SELECT *,
    LEAST(1.0,
      0.70 * COALESCE(max_model_conf, 0.5)
      + 0.20 * LEAST(1.0, LN(1 + total_repeat_count) / LN(4))
      + CASE WHEN has_self_assertion = 1 THEN 0.20 ELSE 0.05 END
      + CASE WHEN total_repeat_count > 2 THEN 0.10 ELSE 0.0 END
    ) AS computed_confidence
  FROM aggregated
)
SELECT scored.* FROM scored
LEFT JOIN core_claim cc
  ON cc.speaker_id = scored.speaker_id
  AND cc.key_label = scored.key_label
  WHERE cc.core_id IS NULL
  AND (
    (scored.has_self_assertion = 1 AND scored.computed_confidence >= 0.75)
    OR
    (scored.has_self_assertion = 0 AND scored.total_repeat_count >= 2 AND scored.computed_confidence >= 0.85 AND scored.span_days >= 7)
  );

INSERT INTO core_claim (speaker_id, key_label, claim_text, status, confidence, visibility, last_seen)
VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, 'approved', $4, 'all', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (speaker_id, key_label) DO UPDATE SET
  claim_text = CASE
    WHEN core_claim.locked THEN core_claim.claim_text
    ELSE EXCLUDED.claim_text
  END,
  confidence = EXCLUDED.confidence,
  status = CASE
    WHEN core_claim.locked THEN core_claim.status
    ELSE 'approved'
  END,
  visibility = CASE
    WHEN core_claim.locked THEN core_claim.visibility
    ELSE 'all'
  END,
  last_seen = NOW();

INSERT INTO audit_log (who, action, details)
VALUES ('guardian', 'promote', $1::jsonb);

UPDATE core_claim
SET status = 'proposed'
WHERE status = 'provisional'
  AND ttl_ts IS NOT NULL
  AND ttl_ts < NOW();
